settings.title:
Creatine
monohydrate
settings.body: One of the most-studied supplement ingredients there is. Creatine increases physical performance in successive bursts of short-term, high-intensity exercise — strength on your own terms, at the studied daily amount.

settings.title:
Verisol®
collagen peptides
settings.body: The full 5g of Verisol® bioactive collagen peptides — the branded, studied peptide. Alongside it, biotin and vitamin C contribute to the maintenance of normal skin, and vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation.

settings.title:
The
cofactors
settings.body: Eleven supporting compounds, every one disclosed: myo + D-chiro inositol 40:1 (500mg — studied in PCOS research), dandelion root and cranberry PAC (both traditionally used botanicals), hyaluronic acid, and a complete multivitamin at 100% NRV.
settings.evidence: Every dose printed on the label

settings.title: Days 1–7 · half scoop
settings.body: 7g in 200ml of cold water, every morning. Half the dose, same ritual — you're building the habit first.

settings.title: Day 8 onwards · full scoop
settings.body: Move up to the full 14g scoop. This is the studied daily amount — from here, it's just consistency.

settings.title: Miss a day?
settings.body: Just carry on the next morning. No doubling up, no guilt. The ritual works because it's kind.
